LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT AS TO INTERESTED PARTY JOHN STANLEY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. calendar.matters:
Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party John Stanley
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Amy Sheareer of the San Francisco District Attorney's Office (415-553-9706) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party John Stanley is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Written order and judgment are signed and filed.
